sentences: The letter E is the most common letter in the English language. 字母 E 是英語中最常用的字母。
He marked the spot with a large capital E. 他用一個大寫的 E 標記了那個位置。
Ea was the Babylonian god of wisdom and water. 艾是巴比倫的智慧與水之神。
Ancient myths describe the powers of Ea. 古代神話描述了艾的力量。
Each student in the class received a small gift. 班上的每個學生都收到了一份小禮物。
We should respect each other's opinions and feelings. 我們應該尊重彼此的意見和感受。
Flowers were blooming eachwhere in the valley. 山谷裡到處都開滿了花。
He searched eachwhere for the missing keys. 他到處尋找丟失的鑰匙。
The students were very eager to learn about space exploration. 學生們非常渴望了解太空探索。
She is eager to start her new job at the tech company next week. 她渴望下週在科技公司開始她的新工作。
The nurse checked the patient eagerly before bedtime. 護理師在睡前很eagerly地檢查病人。
We reviewed the project eagerly to avoid mistakes. 我們很eagerly地檢查專案，以避免出錯。
We need more eagerness to solve this issue effectively. 我們需要更多eagerness才能有效解決這個問題。
Without eagerness, the team could not finish on time. 沒有eagerness，團隊就無法準時完成。
The bald eagle is the national emblem of the United States. 白頭海雕是美國的國徽。
The eagle soared high above the mountains with its vast wings. 老鷹展翅在高山之上翱翔。
The man had sharp, eaglelike features. 那個人有著像老鷹般銳利的特徵。
The bird soared through the air with eaglelike grace. 那隻鳥以像老鷹般的優雅在空中翱翔。
The eagless watched over her nest from the high cliff. 母鷹從高聳的懸崖上守望著她的巢。
An eagless and her young were spotted on the mountain. 在山上發現了一隻母鷹和她的幼鳥。

meaning: 鷹石 (傳說中老鷹巢裡的石頭)
sentences: In ancient times, eaglestone was believed to have magical properties. 在古代，鷹石被認為具有神奇的特性。
He found an eaglestone near the base of the mountain. 他在山腳附近發現了一塊鷹石。
The eaglet was learning how to fly. 幼鷹正在學習如何飛翔。
We watched the parent eagle feed the hungry eaglet. 我們看著親鳥鷹餵食飢餓的幼鷹。
Eaglewood is highly valued for its fragrant resin. 沉香木因其芬芳的樹脂而受到高度重視。
Incense made from eaglewood has a unique scent. 由沉香木製成的香有一種獨特的香味。
The eagre roared up the river mouth during the high tide. 漲潮時，涌潮咆哮著沖上河口。
Observers gathered to watch the spectacular eagre. 觀察者們聚集在一起觀看壯觀的涌潮。
The coach wrote down ean with the note "加 失事的,遇難的". 教練把 ean 記下來，並註記「加 失事的,遇難的」。
We practiced using ean in two different sentences. 我們練習把 ean 放進兩個不同句子裡。
She whispered something softly into my ear. 她在我耳邊輕聲說了些什麼。
He has a very good ear for music and can play by ear. 他對音樂很有天賦，可以聽音彈奏。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "ear lobe" for next week. 老師要我們把「ear lobe」背起來，下週要用。
You can use "ear lobe" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「ear lobe」。
The child complained of a severe earache. 孩子抱怨耳朵非常痛。
A warm compress can sometimes help relieve an earache. 熱敷有時可以幫助減解耳朵痛。
She wore a pair of elegant silver earbobs. 她戴著一對優雅的銀耳墜。
The earbob sparkled in the light. 耳墜在光線下閃閃發光。
He wore earcaps to protect his ears from the cold wind. 他戴著護耳器以保護耳朵不受寒風吹襲。
Earcaps are often used by workers in noisy environments. 在喧鬧環境中工作的工人經常使用護耳器。
Earcockle is a disease caused by nematodes in wheat. 小麥粒線蟲病是由小麥中的線蟲引起的疾病。
The farmer checked his crops for signs of earcockle. 農民檢查他的莊稼是否有小麥粒線蟲病的跡象。
The doctor prescribed eardrops for his infection. 醫生為他的感染開了耳藥水。
She chose a beautiful pearl eardrop for the wedding. 她為婚禮選了一對美麗的珍珠耳環。
He used an eardropper to administer the medicine. 他使用滴耳器來用藥。
The jewelry shop displayed several antique eardroppers. 珠寶店展示了幾件古董耳墜。
The doctor checked her eardrum during the exam. 醫師在檢查時查看了她的eardrum。
The pain in my eardrum disappeared after a short rest. 我稍微休息後，eardrum的疼痛就消失了。
He was a large- eared man. 他是一個大耳朵的人。
The report describes the result as eared. 報告稱此結果為預期結果。
The plant has unique, earflower-like structures. 這種植物具有獨特的耳狀花結構。
They admired the delicate shape of the earflower. 他們讚賞耳狀花精緻的形狀。

meaning: 滔滔不絕的話；一頓責罵
sentences: His mother gave him an earful for coming home late. 他母親因他回家晚而給了他一頓訓斥。
I got an earful of gossip at the party last night. 昨晚在派對上我聽了一大堆八卦。
The doctor examined the patient's earhole for any blockage. 醫生檢查了病人的耳孔是否有任何阻塞。
Be careful not to poke anything into your earhole. 小心不要把任何東西戳進耳孔裡。
The sailors tightened the earing to secure the sail. 水手們拉緊縮帆索以固定帆。
The wheat is starting to show its earing. 小麥開始結穗了。
We practiced using earl in two different sentences. 我們練習把 earl 放進兩個不同句子裡。
We discussed the term earl in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 earl 這個詞。
I usually wake up early to go for a run before work. 我通常早起，在上班前去跑步。
The early bird catches the worm. 早起的鳥兒有蟲吃。
He hurt his earmuff during basketball practice. 他在打籃球時弄傷了earmuff。
The doctor checked her earmuff during the exam. 醫師在檢查時查看了她的earmuff。
He works hard to earn enough money to support his family. 他努力工作以賺取足夠的錢來扶養家人。
She managed to earn a lot of respect from her colleagues. 她設法贏得了同事們的許多尊重。
The earner explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位earner清楚地向大家說明了問題。
Our team invited a skilled earner to lead the workshop. 我們團隊邀請了一位有經驗的earner帶領工作坊。
She gave an earnest promise to finish the project on time today. 她今天鄭重（認真）承諾會準時完成專案。
He is an earnest and hardworking student who always gets marks. 他是一個認真且勤奮的學生，總是拿高分。
The article mentioned earnings in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 earnings。
We discussed the term earnings in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 earnings 這個詞。
I usually use my earphones to listen to music while I'm jogging. 我慢跑時通常使用耳機聽音樂。
Could you please lend me your pair of wireless earphones for a bit? 能請妳借我妳那副無線耳機用一下嗎？
Please earring the plan before noon. 請在中午前earring計畫。
The guide earringed the plan carefully yesterday. 導覽員昨天仔細地earring了計畫。
She wore a pair of beautiful pearl earrings to the wedding. 她戴了一對漂亮的珍珠耳環參加婚禮。
He bought his mother a set of gold earrings for her birthday. 他買了一套金耳環送給母親過生日。
The success of the project depends on earshot. 這個專案是否成功取決於earshot。
Without earshot, the team could not finish on time. 沒有earshot，團隊就無法準時完成。
The Earth is the third planet from the sun in our solar system. 地球是距離太陽第三近的行星。
We must take steps to protect the environment and save the Earth. 我們必須採取措施保護環境，拯救地球。

meaning: 與地球或這個世界有關，而不是天堂；陸地的。
sentences: earthly joys 塵世的歡樂
The Garden of Earthly Delights 人間歡樂庭園
The city was hit by a massive earthquake several years ago. 這座城市幾年前曾遭受大地震襲擊。
Earthquakes are a common natural phenomenon in this region. 地震是這個地區常見的自然現象。

meaning: 類似於泥土或土壤（即地球）。
sentences: The earthy smell of fresh turned loam told me the farmer had started plowing this morning, the definitive sign of spring for me. 新鮮翻耕的壤土的泥土氣味告訴我，農民今天早上已經開始犁地，這對我來說是春天的明確標誌。
Something described as earthy is resembling dirt or soil (i.e. earth). 被描述為泥土的東西類似於泥土或土壤（即地球）。
You should avoid using cotton swabs to clean earwax. 你應該避免使用棉花棒來清理耳垢。
The doctor used a special tool to remove the excess earwax. 醫生使用特殊工具清除了多餘的耳垢。
The new software was designed to improve the ease of use. 這款新軟體旨在提高易用性。
She spoke with ease and confidence during the presentation. 她在簡報時表現得從容自信。
Easier said than done! 說起來容易做起來難！
The team responded easier to the change. 團隊對變化的反應更容易。

meaning: 比平常或預期更快或可能。
sentences: not easily offended 不容易被冒犯
I get distracted very easily. 我很容易分心。
The sun rises in the east and sets in the west. 太陽從東方升起，從西方落下。
Taiwan is located to the east of the Asian continent. 台灣位於亞洲大陸的東邊。
The eastbound train is late again! 東行列車又晚點了！
Something described as eastbound is moving or heading towards the east. 被描述為東行的物體正在向東移動或前進。

meaning: 東風（從東邊吹來的風）；尤其是，一個堅強的人；一場風暴。
sentences: The term easter refers to an easterly wind (a wind blowing from the east); especially, a strong one; a storm of such winds. 復活節一詞指的是東風（從東方吹來的風）；尤其是，一個堅強的人；一場這樣的風暴。
The lesson introduced easter as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了復活節作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
an easterly course or voyage 向東的航線或航程
The report describes the result as easterly. 報告將結果描述為東風。
The city is located on the beautiful eastern coast of the island. 這座城市位於島嶼美麗的東海岸。
Many eastern cultures have a long and rich history. 許多東方文化都擁有悠久且豐富的歷史。
The term eastward refers to the direction or area lying to the east. 術語“向東”是指位於東方的方向或區域。
The lesson introduced eastward as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「向東」這個術語，這是一個值得理解的有用術語。
The exam was much easier than I had expected. 考試比我預想的要簡單得多。
It is easy to get lost in the narrow streets of the old town. 在舊城區狹窄的街道上很容易迷路。
It's important to eat a balanced diet for good health. 均衡飲食對健康非常重要。
What would you like to eat for dinner tonight? 你今晚晚餐想吃什麼？
Something described as eaten is having been consumed by eating. 被描述為吃過的東西已經被吃掉了。
The word eaten is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「吃掉」這個詞常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。
a very fussy eater 非常挑食
The term eater refers to a person or animal who eats. 食者一詞是指吃東西的人或動物。
eating chickens; eating quails 吃雞；吃鵪鶉
The report describes the result as eating. 報告將結果描述為進食。
The birds built a nest under the eaves of the house. 鳥兒在房子的屋簷下築了巢。
Water was dripping from the eaves after the rain. 雨後水從屋簷上滴下來。

meaning: 皮膚黝黑；黑色的;尤其是對非裔美國人。
sentences: Something described as ebony is dark-skinned; black; especially in reference to African-Americans. 被描述為烏木的東西是深色皮膚的；黑色的;尤其是關於非裔美國人。
The word ebony is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 烏木這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
He is an eccentric billionaire who spends most of his time in a remote castle. 他是一個古怪的億萬富翁，大部分時間都待在偏遠的城堡裡。
She was known for her eccentric style of dress and unusual hobbies. 她以古怪的穿衣風格和不同尋常的愛好而聞名。

meaning: 古怪或古怪的品質；任何古怪的行為。
sentences: The term eccentricity refers to The quality of being eccentric or odd; any eccentric behaviour. 術語“古怪”是指古怪或古怪的品質；任何古怪的行為。
We learned the meaning of eccentricity during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了偏心的意義。
We could hear the echo of our voices in the deep mountain cave. 我們能在深山洞穴中聽到我們聲音的迴響。
The famous author's words managed to echo in my mind for days. 那位著名作家的話在我腦海中迴盪了好幾天。

meaning: 選擇各種學說、方法或風格中最好的組合。
sentences: Something described as eclectic is selecting a mixture of what appears to be best of various doctrines, methods or styles. 所謂折衷主義是指選擇各種學說、方法或風格中最好的東西的混合。
The word eclectic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 折衷主義這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
Thousands of people gathered to watch the total solar eclipse yesterday. 數千人聚集在一起觀看昨天的日全蝕。
The young musician's success threatened to eclipse his older brother's career. 那位年輕音樂家的成功威脅要使他哥哥的事業失色。
The project aims to study the ecological impact of the new highway system. 該專案旨在研究新高速公路系統對生態的影響。
The organization promotes ecological awareness and environmental protection. 該組織推廣生態意識和環境保護。
She decided to study ecology because she is passionate about environmental protection. 她決定學習生態學，因為她對環境保護充滿熱情。
The destruction of the rainforest has a devastating impact on the local ecology. 熱帶雨林的破壞對當地生態產生了毀滅性的影響。
The government is taking steps to stimulate economic growth and reduce unemployment. 政府正採取措施刺激經濟增長並減少失業。
The country's economic situation is expected to improve in the coming months. 該國的經濟狀況預計將在未來幾個月內有所改善。
Electric vehicles are much more economical to operate than traditional ones. 電動車的運作成本比傳統汽車經濟（節省）得多。
She decided to buy a more economical car to save money on gasoline. 她決定買一輛更經濟實惠的車，以節省汽油錢。

meaning: 以經濟的方式；不浪費；不奢侈。
sentences: If someone acts economically, they do so in a way that is in an economical manner; not wastefully; not extravagantly. 如果某人採取經濟行為，他們就會以經濟的方式這樣做；不浪費；並不奢侈。
The speaker responded economically during the discussion. 發言者在討論中做出了經濟的回應。
He decided to study international economics at a leading university in Taipei. 他決定在台北的一所頂尖大學攻讀國際經濟學。
The professor gave a fascinating lecture on the basic principles of economics. 教授做了一場關於經濟學基本原理的精彩講座。
The leading economist predicted a significant drop in the global inflation rate. 這位頂尖經濟學家預測全球通膨率將大幅下降。
He works as a senior research economist for an international financial firm. 他在一家國際金融公司擔任高級研究經濟學家。
The global economy has faced many challenges in the recent few years. 全球經濟在最近幾年面臨了許多挑戰。
Using public transport is a great way to save money and support the economy. 使用大眾運輸是省錢並支持經濟的一種好方法。
The coral reef is a complex and fragile ecosystem that supports many marine species. 珊瑚礁是一個複雜且脆弱的生態系統，支撐著許多海洋物種。
Human activity can easily disrupt the delicate balance of a natural ecosystem. 人類活動很容易破壞自然生態系統的微妙平衡。

meaning: 一種如此強烈的情緒狀態，以至於一個人無法理性思考和自我控制。
sentences: an ecstasy of remorse 悔恨的狂喜
The term ecstasy refers to a state of emotion so intense that a person is carried beyond rational thought and self-control. 狂喜一詞指的是一種強烈到超越理性思維和自我控制的情緒狀態。

meaning: 與狂喜或過度情緒有關或由其引起。
sentences: ecstatic gaze ecstatic trance 欣喜若狂的凝視 欣喜若狂的恍惚
Something described as ecstatic is relating to, or caused by, ecstasy or excessive emotion. 被描述為狂喜的事物與狂喜或過度情緒有關或由狂喜或過度情緒引起。
She suffers from severe eczema and has to use a special cream. 她患有嚴重的濕疹，必須使用特殊的藥膏。
The dermatologist recommended avoiding certain soaps to prevent eczema flares. 皮膚科醫生建議避免使用某些肥皂以防濕疹發作。

meaning: 形成渦流；進入或彷彿進入漩渦；繞圈移動。
sentences: He waded out, the stream eddying around his legs. 他涉水而出，溪流在他的腿邊旋轉。
To eddy means to form an eddy; to move in, or as if in, an eddy; to move in a circle. To eddy 的意思是形成渦流；進入或彷彿進入漩渦；繞圈移動。
Please be careful not to stand too close to the cliff edge. 請小心不要站得離懸崖邊緣太近。
The company is striving to gain a competitive edge in the market. 公司正努力在市場中取得競爭優勢。
The monks were forbidden to carry edged weapons such as swords and axes. 僧侶被禁止攜帶刀劍、斧頭等利器。
The report describes the result as edged. 報告將結果描述為「有優勢」。

meaning: 任何形成、定義或標記某物邊緣的東西。
sentences: The decorative edging around the door makes it easier to find in the dark. 門周圍的裝飾性邊緣使其在黑暗中更容易找到。
The term edging refers to Anything that forms, defines, or marks the edge of something. 術語「邊緣」是指形成、定義或標記某物邊緣的任何事物。

meaning: 富有創造性、挑戰性；前沿;前沿。
sentences: Something described as edgy is creatively challenging; cutting edge; leading edge. 被描述為前衛的事物在創造性上具有挑戰性；前沿;領先優勢。
The word edgy is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 尖銳這個詞經常被用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。
The forest is filled with many types of edible mushrooms and berries. 森林裡長滿了許多種可食用的蘑菇和漿果。
Please make sure that the plants are edible before you decide to pick them. 在採摘植物前，請確保它們是可食用的。

meaning: 法律公告或其他權威命令。
sentences: The term edict refers to a proclamation of law or other authoritative command. 法令一詞是指法律的公告或其他權威命令。
The lesson introduced edict as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「法令」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The journalist spent the entire afternoon editing the new report. 記者花了一整下午編輯新的報導。
You can edit your profile information on the company website. 您可以在公司網站上編輯您的個人資料。
The latest edition of the dictionary includes many new words. 這本字典的最新版本收錄了許多新單字。
I'm looking for a rare first edition of my favorite novel. 我正在尋找我最喜歡的小說的稀有首版。
He works as a senior editor at a large international newspaper. 他在一家大型國際報社擔任資深編輯。
The magazine editor reviewed several articles for the next issue. 雜誌編輯審閱了下一期要發表的幾篇文章。
The newspaper's latest editorial criticizes the government's new policy. 報紙最新的社論批評了政府的新政策。
He is a member of the editorial board of a major scientific journal. 他是一家主要科學期刊編輯委員會的一員。
The organization aims to educate people about environmental issues. 該組織旨在教育人們有關環境議題的知識。
Parents should educate their children about healthy eating habits. 父母應該教育孩子健康的飲食習慣。
She is a highly educated woman with a PhD in physics. 她是一位受過高等教育的女性，擁有物理學博士學位。
A well-educated population is essential for a country's development. 受過良好教育的人口對於一個國家的發展至關重要。
Education is the most powerful tool for changing the world. 教育是改變世界最強大的工具。
The government should invest more in public school education. 政府應該在公立學校教育上投入更多資源。
The television program about nature was very educational. 那個關於大自然的電視節目非常具教育意義。
The university offers various educational resources for students. 該大學為學生提供多樣化的教育資源。

meaning: 因教育工作而傑出的人，教師。
sentences: The term educator refers to a person distinguished for their educational work, a teacher. 教育者一詞指的是教育工作中傑出的人，即教師。
The lesson introduced educator as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「教育者」這個易於理解的有用術語。
The eel was wriggling in the fisherman's net. 鰻魚在漁夫的網裡扭動著。
Unagi is a popular Japanese dish made with grilled eel. 「Unagi」是一道受歡迎的日本料理，用烤鰻魚製成。
The abandoned house had an eerie atmosphere. 這座廢棄的房子有一種怪異的氛圍。
An eerie silence fell over the forest after the storm. 暴風雨過後，森林裡一片死寂，令人毛骨悚然。
The global economic crisis had a devastating effect on many. 全球經濟危機對許多人產生了毀滅性的影響。
The new law will come into effect starting from next month. 新法律將於下個月開始生效。
The new strategy proved to be highly effective in reducing costs. 事實證明，新策略在降低成本方面非常有效。
We need to find an effective way to address the issue. 我們需要找到一個有效的方法來處理這個問題。

meaning: 本質上，實際上，出於所有實際目的。
sentences: On paper, the answer seems to be yes, but, effectively, the answer is no. 從表面上看，答案似乎是肯定的，但實際上，答案是否定的。
If someone acts effectively, they do so in a way that is essentially, in effect, for all practical purposes. 如果某人的行為有效，那麼他們的行為方式本質上是為了所有實際目的。

meaning: 有效 ，即取得成果的屬性。
sentences: The effectiveness of the drug was well established. 該藥物的 有效性 已被充分證實。 該藥物的有效性已得到充分證實。 該藥物的有效性已得到充分證實。
The term effectiveness refers to The property of being effective, of achieving results. 有效性一詞是指取得成果的 有效 屬性。 有效性一詞是指有效、有成果的特性。 完成工作是指取得成果的有效屬性。

meaning: 產生預期效果的能力程度；有效性。
sentences: The term efficacy refers to a degree of ability to produce a desired effect; effectiveness. 功效一詞是指產生所需效果的能力程度；效力。
The lesson introduced efficacy as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了功效作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The new software is designed to improve the efficiency of our daily tasks. 這款新軟體旨在提高我們日常任務的效率。
Improving energy efficiency is an important goal for modern sustainable life. 提高能源效率是現代永續生活的一個重要目標。
The new system is much more efficient and saves a lot of time and resources. 新系統效率高得多，節省了大量時間與資源。
She is a very efficient worker who always finishes her projects on time. 她是一位非常高效的員工，總能準時完成她的專案。

meaning: 令人憎恨的人、團體或物體的虛擬或其他粗略表現。
sentences: In England on Bonfire Night, an effigy is often burned. 在英國，篝火之夜經常會焚燒雕像。
The term effigy refers to A dummy or other crude representation of a person, group or object that is hated. 肖像一詞是指被憎恨的人、團體或物體的假人或其他粗略的代表。
It takes a lot of time and effort to learn a new language. 學習一門新語言需要花費大量的時間與精力。
The project was a huge success thanks to everyone's effort. 由於大家的努力，這個專案取得了巨大的成功。

meaning: 不費力；沒有困難或掙扎。
sentences: She hoisted the child effortlessly and plopped him in bed. 她毫不費力地把孩子抱起來，放到床上。
If someone acts effortlessly, they do so in a way that is without effort; without difficulty or struggle. 如果某人的行為毫不費力，那麼他就是以不費力的方式這樣做；沒有困難或掙扎。
I usually have two boiled eggs for breakfast. 我早餐通常吃兩個水煮蛋。
Don't put all your eggs in one basket. 不要把所有的雞蛋都放在同一個籃子裡（切勿孤注一擲）。
I like to make a delicious pasta sauce with roasted eggplant. 我喜歡用烤茄子做一道美味的義大利麵醬。
Eggplant is a versatile vegetable that can be cooked in many ways. 茄子是一種用途廣泛的蔬菜，可以有很多種做法。
He has a very large ego and always thinks he is more important than others. 他非常自負（自我意識強），總覺得自己比別人重要。
Working in a team requires you to set aside your ego and cooperate with others. 在團隊中工作需要你放下自我，與他人合作。
His egocentric personality makes it hard for him to work in a team. 他那自我中心的性格讓他很難在團隊中工作。
Young children are often egocentric and think only of themselves. 幼兒往往是以自我為中心的，只想到自己。
Pure egoism is the belief that one's own interests are most important. 純粹的利己主義是認為自己的利益最重要的信念。
His actions were motivated by greed and egoism. 他的行為是受貪婪和利己主義驅使的。

meaning: 由於自己的地位、聲望、財富、外表等，相信自己比別人更好、更重要。
sentences: The report describes the result as egotistical. 報告稱這一結果是自負的。
Everyone noticed the egotistical tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息中自負的語氣。

meaning: 引人注目 、 例外 、<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="///Ttle;
sentences: The student has made egregious errors on the examination. 該學生在考試中犯了 嚴重 錯誤。 該名學生在考試中犯了嚴重錯誤。 該名學生在考試中犯了嚴重錯誤。
The report describes the result as egregious. 報告稱這項結果令人震驚。 報告稱這項結果令人震驚。 報告稱此舉令人震驚。
There are eight planets in our solar system. 太陽系有八大行星。
He finished the race in eighth place. 他以第八名的成績完成了比賽。
Something described as eighteenth is the ordinal form of the number eighteen. 被描述為第十八的是數字十八的序數形式。
The word eighteenth is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 第十八這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 整體的八個相等部分之一。
sentences: Two bits equals two eighths of a dollar. 兩位等於一美元的八分之二。
The term eighth refers to one of eight equal parts of a whole. 術語“第八”指的是整體的八個相等部分之一。
You can choose either tea or coffee; it's up to you. 你可以選擇茶或咖啡，隨你決定。
I don't like the cold weather, and my sister doesn't either. 我不喜歡寒冷的天氣，我姊姊也不喜歡。

meaning: 強迫（一個或多個人）離開。
sentences: The man started a fight and was ejected from the bar. 男子發起打鬥，被逐出酒吧。
Andrew was ejected from his apartment for not paying the rent. 安德魯因未付房租而被趕出公寓。
The referee ordered his ejection from the game. 裁判命令他 驅逐 退出比賽。 裁判命令他退出比賽。 裁判命令他退出比賽。
The ejection of the pilot occurred seconds before impact. 飛行員 彈射 發生在撞擊前幾秒。 飛行員在撞擊前幾秒被彈出。 飛行員彈射發生在進攻前幾秒。
They prepared an elaborate dinner to celebrate their parents' golden anniversary. 他們準備了一頓豐盛的（精心的）晚餐來慶祝父母的五十週年金婚。
Could you please elaborate on your proposal and provide more specific details? 您能詳細闡述一下您的提案並提供更多具體細節嗎？
The waist of the pants has an elastic band for a more comfortable fit. 褲腰處有鬆緊帶（彈性的），穿起來更舒服。
Rubber is a highly elastic material that can stretch and return to shape. 橡膠是一種高度彈性的材料，可以拉伸並恢復形狀。

meaning: 一個量的變化相對於另一個量的變化的敏感度。
sentences: If the sales of an item drop by 5 % when the price increases by 10 %, its price elasticity is −0.5. 如果某種商品的價格上漲 10% 時銷量下降 5%，則其價格彈性為 -0.5。
The term elasticity refers to The sensitivity of changes in a quantity with respect to changes in another quantity. 彈性一詞是指一個量的變化相對於另一個量的變化的敏感度。
The winner was elated by the news of her victory. 獲勝者聽到獲勝的消息興高采烈。
He felt elated after completing the difficult task. 完成這項艱巨的任務後，他感到欣喜若狂。
He hurt his elbow while playing tennis and had to see a doctor. 他打網球時弄傷了手肘，不得不去看醫生。
She accidentally bumped her elbow against the edge of the table. 她不小心把手肘撞到了桌子邊緣。
My elder brother is studying engineering at university. 我的哥哥正在大學攻讀工程學。
It is important to respect and listen to your elders. 尊重並傾聽長輩的意見是很重要的。
The kind nurse took great care of the elderly patients at home. 那位熱心的護士在寓所裡悉心照料老病患。
We should show respect and compassion towards the elderly people. 我們應該對長輩展現尊重與同情。

meaning: （玩家）先從莊家收到牌，然後再收到其他玩家的牌。
sentences: Something described as eldest is (of a player) Receiving cards from the dealer first, before any other players. 被描述為「最年長」的是（玩家）先從莊家收到牌，然後再收到其他玩家的牌。
The word eldest is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「最年長」這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
The citizens will elect a new president in the upcoming election. 公民們將在即將到來的選舉中選出一位新總統。
He was elected as the captain of the school's basketball team. 他被選為學校籃球隊的隊長。
The official results of the national election will be announced tomorrow. 國家選舉的官方結果將在明天宣佈。
Citizens are encouraged to participate in the upcoming local election. 鼓勵公民參加即將舉行的當地選舉。

meaning: 開放選擇；自由選擇；不必要;未成年人。
sentences: After accounting for all of my required courses, there is hardly any room in my schedule for any elective ones. 算完所有必修課後，我的行程幾乎沒有空間可以安排任何選修課。
Something described as elective is open to choice; freely chosen; unnecessary; minor. 所謂選修課是可以選擇的；自由選擇；不必要;次要的。

meaning: 與選民有關或由選民組成。
sentences: Something described as electoral is relating to or composed of electors. 被描述為選舉的事物與選舉人有關或由選舉人組成。
The word electoral is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 選舉這個詞常用來描述人、事或情況。

meaning: 由一名或多名民選官員代表的地理區域；一個選區，一個選區。
sentences: The electorate of Finchley borders on the electorate of Much-Binding-in-the-Marsh, splitting the new housing estate of Royal Cupolas. 芬奇利選區與沼澤地結合選區接壤，將皇家圓頂的新住宅區分開。
The term electorate refers to a geographical area represented by one or more elected officials; a constituency, an electoral district. 選民一詞是指由一名或多名民選官員代表的地理區域；一個選區，一個選區。
The city is planning to replace all its buses with electric ones. 城市正計劃將所有公車更換為電動公車。
Electric vehicles are becoming more popular due to environmental concerns. 由於環境考量，電動車正變得越來越流行。
The building had some serious problems with its electrical system. 這棟建築的電力系統有一些嚴重的問題。
He works as an electrical engineer at a power plant. 他在一家發電廠擔任電機工程師。
The concert was electrically exciting. 這場音樂會激動人心。
If someone acts electrically, they do so in a way that is in an electric manner. 如果有人用電來行動，他們就會以一種用電的方式來做這件事。
We need to call an electrician to fix the broken wiring in the kitchen. 我們需要請電工來修理廚房損壞的電路。
He works as an electrician for a large construction company in the city. 他在一家大型建築公司擔任電氣技師。
The sudden power outage left the entire city without any electricity. 突然的停電讓整座城市失去了所有電力。
We should all take steps to reduce our daily electricity consumption. 我們都應該採取措施減少日常用電量。

meaning: 電子風格的嘻哈音樂；電子放克。
sentences: The term electro refers to an electronic style of hip hop; electrofunk. 「電子」一詞指的是嘻哈的電子風格；電子放克。
The lesson introduced electro as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了電作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 電流在電路的金屬和非金屬部分之間通過的端子。
sentences: The term electrode refers to the terminal through which electric current passes between metallic and nonmetallic parts of an electric circuit. 術語“電極”是指電流在電路的金屬部分和非金屬部分之間通過的端子。
The lesson introduced electrode as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了電極這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 電流通過導電溶液或熔鹽時產生的化學變化。
sentences: The term electrolysis refers to The chemical change produced by passing an electric current through a conducting solution or a molten salt. 電解一詞是指電流通過導電溶液或熔鹽所產生的化學變化。
We learned the meaning of electrolysis during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了電解的意義。

meaning: 含有此類物質的 溶液 ，因此也可以導電。
sentences: Some modern lead-acid batteries are sealed because they never need to have any electrolyte added during their service life. 一些現代鉛酸電池是密封的，因為它們在使用壽命期間不需要添加任何 電解質 。 一些現代鉛酸電池是密封的，因為它們在使用壽命期間不需要添加任何電解質。 一些現代鉛酸電池是密封的，因為它們在使用期間不需要添加任何碳水化合物。
The term electrolyte refers to A solution containing such substances, which therefore also conducts electricity. 電解質一詞是指 含有此類物質的 溶液 ，因此也可以導電。 電解質一詞是指含有此類物質的溶液，因此也可以導電。 電解質是指含有此類物質的溶液，因此也可以導電。

meaning: 帶負電荷並繞著原子核運行的亞原子粒子；電子在導體中的流動就形成了電。
sentences: The term electron refers to the subatomic particle having a negative charge and orbiting the nucleus; the flow of electrons in a conductor constitutes electricity. 電子一詞是指帶負電荷並繞著原子核運行的亞原子粒子；電子在導體中的流動就形成了電。
The lesson introduced electron as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了電子這個易於理解的有用術語。
The store sells a wide variety of modern electronic devices and gadgets. 這家店銷售各式各樣的現代電子設備與小零件。
Modern life depends heavily on various advanced electronic systems now. 現代生活現今嚴重依賴各種先進的電子系統。
He decided to study electronics and communication engineering at college. 他決定在大學攻讀電子與通訊工程。
The city center is a major hub for the international electronics trade. 市中心是國際電子貿易的主要樞紐。
The ballroom was decorated with great style and elegance. 舞廳佈置得非常有格調且優雅。
She carries herself with poise and elegance. 她舉止端莊優雅。
It is important to maintain a elegant balance between work and life. 在工作與生活之間保持「elegant」的平衡很重要。
The results of the study were quite elegant and unexpected. 研究結果相當「elegant」且出乎意料。
Water is a chemical compound consisting of two essential elements. 水是由兩種必備元素組成的化學化合物。
Trust is a fundamental element of a strong and lasting relationship. 信任是建立牢固持久關係的一個基本要素。

meaning: 元素的、關於元素的或作為元素的（與化合物相對）。
sentences: Something described as elemental is of, relating to, or being an element (as opposed to a compound). 被描述為元素的東西是元素的、與元素相關的、或元素的（與化合物相對）。
The word elemental is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 元素這個字常用來描述人、事物或情況。
My younger brother is currently a third-grade student at primary school. 我弟弟目前就讀（初級的）小學三年級。
The course provides students with an elementary understanding of science. 這門課程為學生提供對科學的初步（基礎）理解。
"elementary school" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「elementary school」非常好用。
We used "elementary school" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「elementary school」。
The African elephant is the largest land animal on Earth. 非洲象是地球上最大的陸地動物。
Elephants are known for their intelligence and long-term memory. 象以其聰明和長久記憶力聞名。
The discovery helped to elevate his status among his colleagues and peers. 這項發現有助於提高（提升）他在同事和同行中的地位。
You should elevate your leg to help reduce the swelling after the injury. 你應該抬高腿部以幫助減輕受傷後的腫脹。

meaning: 增加，特別是高於正常水平。
sentences: the elevated language of poetry 詩歌的高尚語言
The patient presented with elevated blood pressure. 患者出現血壓升高。

meaning: 從較低的地方、條件或品質提升到較高的行為；指物質、人、心、聲音等。
sentences: elevation to a throne 登上王位
elevation to sainthood 晉升為聖人
Please take the elevator to the tenth floor of the building. 請搭電梯到這棟大樓的十樓。
The hotel elevator is broken, so we have to use the stairs. 飯店電梯壞了，所以我們必須走樓梯。

meaning: 一支由 11 名球員組成的足球隊；先發陣容。
sentences: The term eleven refers to a football team of eleven players; the starting lineup. 十一人一詞指的是由十一名球員組成的足球隊；先發陣容。
The lesson introduced eleven as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「十一」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Something described as eleventh is the ordinal form of the number eleven. 被描述為第十一的是數字十一的序數形式。
The word eleventh is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「第十一」這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 引出，帶出，帶出（潛在的東西）；從某人或某事處獲取資訊。
sentences: Fred wished to elicit the time of the meeting from Jane. 弗雷德想從簡那裡打聽會議的時間。
Did you elicit a response? 你引起回應了嗎？

meaning: 符合條件的狀態、品質或事實。
sentences: determine eligibility 確定資格
meet eligibility 符合資格
You must be over eighteen to be eligible to vote in the national elections. 你必須年滿十八歲才有資格在全國大選中投票。
He is considered an eligible bachelor because of his successful career and kindness. 由於他成功的事業和善良的性格，他被認為是一個合適的（理想的）單身漢。
The government aims to eliminate poverty and improve social justice. 政府旨在消除貧困並提升社會正義。
You should try to eliminate unnecessary distractions to stay focused. 妳應該努力排除不必要的干擾以保持專注。

meaning: 將失敗的參賽者排除在比賽、錦標賽或其他比賽之外的行為。
sentences: Everton require at least 3 goals in the second leg to avoid elimination from the FA Cup. 埃弗頓需要在次回合至少進3球才能避免被淘汰出足總盃。
The term elimination refers to the act of excluding a losing contestant from a match, tournament, or other competition. 淘汰一詞是指將失敗的參賽者排除在比賽、錦標賽或其他比賽之外的行為。

meaning: 具有優越社會或經濟地位以及隨之而來的社會權力、優勢或特權的特殊群體或社會階層；此類團體的成員。
sentences: constituting an elite 構成精英
the hubris of the elites 精英的傲慢

meaning: 據稱可以治癒所有疾病；萬能藥，靈丹妙藥。
sentences: The term elixir refers to the alleged cure for all ailments; cure-all, panacea. 「靈丹妙藥」一詞指的是所謂的包治百病的藥物。萬能藥，靈丹妙藥。

It could be serious, my head needs urgent examining. 情況可能很嚴重，我的大腦需要緊急檢查。
People often examining when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在情況需要時進行檢查。
Could you please give me an example of how to use this word? 你可以給我一個如何使用這個單字的例子嗎？
This is a classic example of modern architecture. 這是現代建築的一個經典範例。

meaning: 大大消耗了一個人的耐心；非常惱火；激怒了。
sentences: She grew exasperated by his constant interruptions. 她對他不斷的打擾感到惱火。
The report describes the result as exasperated. 報告稱這項結果令人憤怒。

meaning: 透過切割、舀取或挖出固體物質的一部分來挖掘或挖空的行為。
sentences: The term excavation refers to the act of excavating, or of making hollow, by cutting, scooping, or digging out a part of a solid mass. 挖掘一詞是指透過切割、舀取或挖出固體物質的一部分來挖掘或挖空的行為。
The lesson introduced excavation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了挖掘作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The excavator is being used to dig a large hole for the foundation. 挖掘機正被用來為地基挖一個大洞。
You can see several excavators at the construction site. 你可以在施工現場看到幾台挖掘機。
The total cost of the project is likely to exceed the original budget. 專案的總成本很可能會超過原始預算。
The beauty of the sunset far exceeded our expectations and left us in awe. 日落的美景遠遠超出了我們的預期，讓我們驚嘆不已。

meaning: 達到很大或不尋常的程度、範圍等；極其。
sentences: If someone acts exceedingly, they do so in a way that is to a great or unusual degree, extent, etc.; extremely. 如果某人行為極端，則他們的行為方式達到了很大或不尋常的程度、程度等；極度。
The speaker responded exceedingly during the discussion. 演講者在討論中反應熱烈。
She has always excelled in mathematics and won several awards. 她一直擅長數學，並贏得了幾項獎項。
To excel in any field, you must be willing to put in a lot of hard work. 要在任何領域勝過（表現優異）他人，你必須願意付出大量努力。
The university is known for its academic excellence and research. 該大學以其卓越的學術與研究聞名。
She received an award for her excellence in the field of science. 她因在科學領域的傑出表現而獲獎。
The hotel provides excellent service to all its guests. 這間飯店為所有客人提供優質的服務。
She is an excellent student who always gets top marks. 她是一位總是拿高分的優秀學生。
The shop is open every day except Sunday. 除了週日，這家店每天都營業。
Everyone enjoyed the party except for Tom, who was feeling ill. 除了湯姆身體不適之外，每個人都很享受派對。
Nothing was to be sacrosanct or sacred, excepting reason itself. 除了理性本身之外，沒有任何事物是神聖不可侵犯的。 除了理性本身之外，沒有任何事物是神聖不可侵犯的。 除了理性本身之外，沒有任何事物是神聖不可侵犯的。
We've all done it, not excepting Borja. 我們都做到了， 除了 博爾哈。 我們都做到了，博爾哈也不例外。 我們都做到了，除了博爾哈。
Everyone must follow the rules and regulations without exception. 每個人都必須遵守規章制度，概不例外。
The project was a huge success, with the exception of few delays. 專案非常成功，除了（例外）幾次延誤。
She is an exceptional student who consistently achieves the highest grades. 她是一位卓越的學生，始終取得最高分。
The museum's collection of ancient artifacts is of exceptional quality and value. 該博物館收藏的古代文物具有非凡的（卓越的）品質和價值。

meaning: 達到不尋常、顯著或特殊的程度。
sentences: In 1957, an exceptionally severe hailstorm struck the village. 1957年，一場特大冰雹襲擊了該村。
The team responded exceptionally to the change. 該團隊對這一變化做出了異常反應。
The teacher read a short excerpt from the novel to the class. 老師向全班朗讀了小說的一段短摘錄（節錄）。
Could you provide an excerpt from your research findings by tomorrow? 您能提供一份研究結果的摘錄嗎？
Eating sugar in excess can lead to various serious health problems. 過量攝取糖分會導致多種嚴重的健康問題。
You will have to pay for any excess baggage beyond the allowed limit. 您必須為超出允許限制的任何額外行李付費。
Excessive consumption of sugar and salt can lead to serious health problems. 過度攝取糖和鹽會導致嚴重的健康問題。
The company was criticized for its excessive spending on luxury office furniture. 該公司因在豪華辦公家具上的過度支出而受到批評。
The application form was excessively complicated. 申請表過於複雜。
If someone acts excessively, they do so in a way that is to an excessive degree. 如果某人行為過度，他們的行為方式就達到了過度的程度。
We can exchange our ideas and experiences during the meeting. 我們可以在會議期間交流我們的想法與經驗。
I'd like to exchange this shirt for a smaller size, please. 我想把這件襯衫換成小一號的。

meaning: 收入稅務辦公室；一個金庫。
sentences: The term exchequer refers to an office of revenue taxation; a treasury. 國庫一詞是指稅務辦公室；一個金庫。
The lesson introduced exchequer as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「財政」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 對國內生產的商品徵收的稅（與對國外商品徵收的關稅相反）。
sentences: The term excise refers to a tax charged on goods produced within the country (as opposed to customs duties, charged on goods from outside the country). 消費稅一詞是指對國內生產的商品徵收的稅（與對國外商品徵收的關稅相反）。
The lesson introduced excise as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了消費稅作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The young puppy is very excitable and jumps on everyone. 這隻小狗很容易興奮，會跳到每個人身上。
He is an excitable person who reacts quickly to any news. 他是一個容易激動的人，對任何消息反應都很快。

meaning: 令人興奮或啟動的行為；喚醒或覺醒的行為。
sentences: The term excitation refers to the act of exciting or putting in motion; the act of rousing up or awakening. 激發一詞是指激發或啟動的行為；喚醒或覺醒的行為。
The lesson introduced excitation as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了激勵作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The news of the holiday excited the children. 度假的消息讓孩子們很興奮。
His speech excited a lot of interest among the audience. 他的演講激起了觀眾的濃厚興趣。
The children were full of excitement before the trip to the zoo. 孩子們去動物園前充滿了興奮之情。
The news of the discovery excited the entire scientific community. 發現的消息讓整個科學界感到興奮。
The children were very excited about going to the zoo. 孩子們對去動物園感到非常興奮。
I am so excited to meet my favorite singer in person. 我非常興奮能親自見到我最喜歡的歌手。
There was a lot of excitement in the air before the big game. 在大賽前，空氣中瀰漫著興奮的氣氛。
The children were jumping up and down with excitement. 孩子們興奮地跳了起來。
The ending of the action movie was really exciting. 那部動作片的結局真的很刺激。
Traveling to a new country is always an exciting experience. 去一個新的國家旅行總是一次令人興奮的經歷。
'Look! A rainbow!' she exclaimed with excitement as she pointed to the sky. 「看！彩虹！」她指著天空興奮地喊道。
He couldn't help but exclaim in surprise when he saw the beautiful gift. 當他看到這份精美的禮物時，禁不住驚訝地大聲說出話來。
He let out an exclamation of pain after hitting his thumb with the hammer. 大拇指被錘子砸到後，他發出一聲痛叫。
Words like 'Oh!' and 'Wow!' are common exclamations. 像「噢！」和「哇！」都是常見的感嘆詞。
She spoke in an exclamatory tone to show her excitement. 她以感嘆的語氣說話以表達她的興奮。
An exclamatory sentence usually ends with an exclamation mark. 感嘆句通常以感嘆號結尾。
The price of the flight excludes meals and baggage fees. 機票價格不包括餐飲和行李費（將其排除在外）。
We should try to include everyone and not exclude anyone from the discussion. 我們應該努力讓每個人都參與進來，不把任何人排除在討論之外。

Our lucky free draw winner will be treated to dinner, bed and breakfast, but the holiday must be taken before December, 1991 (subject to availability and excluding bank holidays). 我們的幸運免費抽獎得獎者將享有晚餐、住宿和早餐，但假期必須在 1991 年 12 月之前進行（視供應情況而定，銀行假期除外）。
The lesson introduced excluding as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了排除作為一個有用的術語來理解。
The group's exclusion from the meeting caused a lot of controversy. 該團體被排除在會議之外引起了很大爭議。
The policy was criticized for its intentional exclusion of certain ethnic groups. 該政策因其有意排除（不包括）某些族群而受到批評。
The club is very exclusive and has a long waiting list for new members. 該俱樂部非常高檔（專屬），新成員的等待名單很長。
The journalist obtained an exclusive interview with the famous celebrity. 這位記者獲得了對那位著名明星的獨家專訪。

meaning: 排除任何事物或任何其他人；單獨或全部。
sentences: These new shoes are made exclusively out of recycled cardboard. 這些新鞋完全由回收紙板製成。
If someone acts exclusively, they do so in a way that is to the exclusion of anything or anyone else; solely or entirely. 如果某人的行為是排他性的，那麼他們的行為方式就是排除其他任何事物或任何人；單獨或全部。
The term exclusivity refers to the quality of being exclusive. 術語「排他性」是指排他性的品質。
The lesson introduced exclusivity as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了排他性作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Proper disposal of human excreta is essential for public health. 妥善處理人體排泄物對於公共衛生至關重要。
The scientist is studying the chemical composition of animal excreta. 科學家正在研究動物排泄物的化學成分。
The kidneys help to excrete waste products from the blood. 腎臟幫助從血液中排泄廢棄物。
Sweat glands excrete water and salts to regulate body temperature. 汗腺排泄水分和鹽分以調節體溫。

meaning: 短暫的休閒旅行；不尋常的旅程。
sentences: While driving home I took an excursion and saw some deer. 在開車回家的路上，我進行了一次短途旅行，看到了一些鹿。
The term excursion refers to a brief recreational trip; a journey out of the usual way. 遊覽一詞是指短暫的休閒旅行；一次不尋常的旅程。
Please excuse me for being late; the traffic was terrible. 很抱歉我遲到了，交通太糟糕了。
Can you give me a good excuse why you didn't finish your work? 你能給我一個沒完成工作的正當理由嗎？
The manager's primary role is to execute the company's long-term strategy. 經理的主要職責是執行公司的長期戰略。
The project was difficult to execute due to a lack of resources and funding. 由於缺乏資源和資金，該專案很難實施。
The successful execution of the plan required careful coordination and teamwork. 該計畫的成功實施（執行）需要周密的協調和團隊合作。
The lawyer argued that the execution of the new policy was unfair to students. 律師主張新政策的實施對學生是不公平的。
She works as an executive at a large technology firm in the city center. 她在市中心的一家大型科技公司擔任高級管理人員。
The executive committee is responsible for making all major business decisions. 執行（行政）委員會負責做出所有重大的業務決策。

meaning: 其品質之高，值得效法；理想的、完美的。
sentences: Her behaviour was always exemplary. 她的行為始終堪稱典範。
Something described as exemplary is of such high quality that it should serve as an example to be imitated; ideal, perfect. 被描述為典範的事物具有如此高的品質，以至於它應該成為被模仿的例子；理想，完美。
Certain low-income families are exempt from paying the new tax. 某些低收入家庭獲准免除繳納新稅。
The teacher decided to exempt her from the final exam due to her illness. 老師因她生病決定豁免她參加期末考試。
The term exemption refers to the state of being exempt; immunity. 豁免一詞是指被豁免的狀態；免疫。
The lesson introduced exemption as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了豁免作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Regular exercise is essential for maintaining good health. 定期運動對於保持健康至關重要。
I need to do more exercise to lose some weight. 我需要多運動來減肥。
You need to exert more pressure on the handle to open the heavy door. 你需要對把手施加更大的壓力才能開啟那扇沈重的門。
He tried to exert his influence to help his friend get the job. 他試圖發揮自己的影響力來幫助朋友獲得那份工作。
The doctor told the patient to inhale deeply and then exhale slowly. 醫生告訴病人深吸氣，然後慢慢呼氣。
You should exhale during the most difficult part of the exercise. 在運動最困難的部分你應該呼氣。
The long hike in the hot sun managed to exhaust everyone today. 在烈日下的長途健行今天竟然讓每個人都筋疲力盡了。
Modern vehicles are designed to reduce the amount of harmful exhaust. 現代汽車設計旨在減少有害廢氣（排氣）的排放量。
He was exhausted after working all night. 工作了一整晚後，他筋疲力盡。
The world's natural resources are being rapidly exhausted. 世界的自然資源正被迅速耗盡。
Climbing the mountain was an exhausting task for the team. 登山對團隊來說是一項令人筋疲力盡的任務。
I had a very exhausting day at the office. 我在辦公室度過了非常疲憊的一天。
He collapsed from exhaustion after the marathon. 馬拉松結束後，他因體力耗盡而倒下了。
The exhaustion of the soil has led to lower crop yields. 土壤肥力的枯竭導致農作物產量下降。

meaning: 包括每一個可能的元素：全面全面。
sentences: We made an exhaustive list. 我們列出了一份詳盡的清單。
Something described as exhaustive is including every possible element: fully comprehensive. 所謂詳盡無遺是指包括所有可能的元素：完全全面。
The museum is hosting a fascinating exhibit of ancient artifacts. 博物館正舉辦一場迷人的古代文物展覽。
The little girl was proudly exhibiting her latest beautiful drawing. 小女孩正自豪地展示（展覽）她最新的漂亮畫作。
The museum is hosting a fascinating exhibition about history. 博物館正舉辦一場迷人的歷史展覽。
They decided to display their artwork at the local art exhibition. 他們決定在當地的藝展上展示他們的藝術品。
The former leader spent many years in exile after being forced out of power. 這位前領導人在被迫下台後在國外流亡（流放）了多年。
He was forced into exile following the violent conflict in his home country. 在家鄉發生暴力衝突後，他被迫流亡。
Many people believe that ghosts exist, while others are skeptical. 許多人相信鬼魂存在，而另一些人則持懷疑態度。
Does life exist on other planets in our vast solar system? 太陽系的其他行星上存在生命嗎？
The discovery of ancient artifacts proved the existence of the city. 古代文物的發現證明了這座城市的存在。
The survival of many species is threatened by human existence. 許多物種的生存受到人類活動的威脅。

meaning: 現有的；有生命或存在，當前；現在發生。
sentences: Something described as existent is existing; having life or being, current; occurring now. 被描述為存在的東西是存在的；有生命或存在，當前；現在正在發生。
The word existent is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 存在這個詞通常用來描述一個人、事物或情況。

meaning: 存在的或與存在有關的。
sentences: an existential risk or threat 存在的风险或威胁
Something described as existential is of or relating to existence. 被描述為存在主義的事物屬於存在或與存在相關。
Please follow the green arrows to find the emergency exit. 請順著綠色箭頭尋找緊急出口。
The exit of the highway was closed due to a serious traffic accident. 由於嚴重交通事故，高速公路出口被關閉了。
The hotel charged an exorbitant price for a small room. 這家飯店對一個小房間收取了過高的費用。
The cost of repairs was absolutely exorbitant. 修理費用簡直貴得離譜。
The garden features a wide variety of exotic plants from all over the world. 花園裡種滿了來自世界各地各式各樣異國情調的（奇特的）植物。
They enjoyed a delicious meal of exotic fruits and seafood during their holiday. 他們在假期裡享用了一頓美味的異國水果和海鮮餐。
The company is planning to expand its business into larger markets. 公司正計劃將其業務擴展到更大的市場。
Metal tends to expand when it is heated and contract when cooled. 金屬受熱時傾向於膨脹（擴張），受冷時則收縮。

meaning: 廣闊的區域，通常是海洋、天空或陸地。
sentences: The term expanse refers to a wide stretch, usually of sea, sky, or land. 「廣闊」一詞指的是廣闊的範圍，通常是海洋、天空或陸地。
The lesson introduced expanse as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「廣闊」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The city center is currently undergoing a major urban expansion. 市中心目前正進行一項重大的城市擴張。
The company celebrated the successful expansion of its global network. 公司慶祝了其全球網絡的成功擴張。
expansive research work 廣泛的研究工作
Something described as expansive is comprehensive in scope or extent. 被描述為廣泛的事物在範圍或程度上是全面的。

meaning: 生活在自己的國家之外。
sentences: an expatriate rebel force 外籍叛軍
The report describes the result as expatriate. 報告將結果描述為外籍人士。
We expect the project to be finished by the end of next week. 我們預計專案將在下週末前完成。
I didn't expect to see you here today! 我沒想到今天會在這裡見到你！

meaning: 期望或預料；期待某事的狀態。
sentences: The term expectancy refers to expectation or anticipation; the state of expecting something. 術語「期望」是指期望或預期；期待某事的狀態。
The lesson introduced expectancy as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了期望作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The project managed to exceed everyone's initial expectations. 專案成功超出了每個人的最初預期。
You should manage your expectations carefully when starting a business. 創業時你應該謹慎管理你的期望值。

meaning: 適合實現某些期望的目的或預期的目的。
sentences: Most people, faced with a decision, will choose the most expedient option. 大多數人在面臨決定時，都會選擇最有利的選擇。
The report describes the result as expedient. 報告稱這一結果是有利的。
He expedited the search by alphabetizing the papers. 他透過按字母順序排列論文來加快搜尋速度。
To expedite means to accelerate the progress of. 加快意味著加快進度。
The scientific expedition set out to study the wildlife in the Arctic regions. 科學考察隊出發去研究北極地區的野生動物。
He led an expedition to the mountains to search for rare historical artifacts. 他帶領一支探險隊前往山區尋找稀有歷史文物。
The student was expelled from school for serious misconduct. 該學生因嚴重行為不端而被開除。
The government decided to expel several foreign diplomats. 政府決定驅逐幾名外國外交官。

meaning: 不是為了 實現 目標而 必不可少的 或<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/mandatory"
sentences: The research department was deemed expendable, and its funding was not renewed. 該研究部門被認為 可消耗 ，其資金也沒有更新。 該研究部門被認為是可消耗的，其資金也沒有更新。 該研究部門被認為可消耗，其資金也沒有更新。
The report describes the result as expendable. 報告稱這一結果是可犧牲的。 報告稱這一結果是可犧牲的。 報告稱這項結果是可以犧牲的。
The government is trying to reduce its annual expenditure on defense. 政府正試圖減少其每年的國防開支（支出）。
The project required a significant expenditure of time and resources. 該專案需要花費（消耗）大量的時間和資源。
The company reimbursed all the travel expenses for the trip. 公司報銷了這次旅行的所有差旅費。
They decided to cut back on their daily expenses to save money. 他們決定縮減日常開支以省錢。
Eating out every day can be very expensive. 每天在外面吃飯可能非常昂貴。
He bought an expensive watch as a gift for his father. 他買了一支昂貴的手錶送給父親。
The job requires at least three years of work experience. 這份工作需要至少三年的工作經驗。
Traveling alone can be a life-changing experience. 獨自旅行可能是一次改變人生的經歷。
He is an experienced doctor who has handled many difficult cases. 他是一位經驗豐富的醫生，處理過許多疑難病例。
We are looking for an experienced teacher to lead the department. 我們正在尋找一位有經驗的老師來領導該部門。

meaning: 屬於、與經驗有關、在經驗中遇到或源自經驗。
sentences: Atheists argue that there is no experiential confirmation for the existence of a god. 無神論者認為，沒有經驗證實神的存在。
Each color has a unique experiential quality. 每種顏色都有獨特的體驗品質。
The researchers are conducting an experiment to test the theory. 研究人員正進行一項實驗以測試該理論。
The scientific experiment provided some very interesting results. 該科學實驗提供了一些非常有趣的結果。
The researchers are conducting experimental tests on the new drug. 研究人員正對這款新藥進行實驗性測試。
The new software is still in its experimental stage of development. 這款新軟體仍處於開發的實驗階段。
She is a leading expert in the field of renewable energy. 她是可再生能源領域的領先專家。
The government consulted several experts before making the decision. 政府在做出決定前諮詢了幾位專家。
The project required a high level of technical expertise and experience. 該專案需要高度的技術專業知識和經驗。
She has extensive expertise in the field of international human rights law. 她在國際人權法領域擁有廣泛的專業知識。
Please check the expiration date on the milk carton before drinking. 飲用前請檢查牛奶盒上的有效期限（期滿日）。
The expiration of the peace treaty led to increased tension in the region. 和約的屆滿（期滿）導致該地區局勢緊張。
My passport will expire next month, so I need to renew it soon. 我的護照下個月到期，所以我需要盡快更新。
The legal contract is set to expire at the end of the year. 該法律合約將於年底終止（到期）。
Could you please explain the meaning of this word? 你可以解釋一下這個單字的意思嗎？
The teacher used a diagram to explain how the heart works. 老師用圖表解釋心臟是如何運作的。
Could you please provide a clear explanation of how this works? 能請您清楚解釋一下這是如何運作的嗎？
The teacher used a simple diagram to help with the explanation. 老師用一個簡單的圖表來輔助解釋。
Below the diagram is an explanatory text. 圖表下方是解釋文字。
Something described as explanatory is intended to serve as an explanation. 被描述為解釋性的東西旨在充當解釋。
The teacher gave explicit instructions on how to complete the assignment. 老師就如何完成作業給出了明確（清晰）的指示。
The movie contains some explicit scenes of violence and is not for children. 這部電影包含一些露骨的（明確的）暴力鏡頭，不適合兒童觀看。
The fifth amendment to the United States constitution provides explicitly for the protection of private property. 美國憲法第五修正案明確規定了對私有財產的保護。
If someone acts explicitly, they do so in a way that is in an explicit manner. 如果某人的行為明確，他們就會以明確的方式這樣做。
The old building was destroyed by a massive controlled explosion. 那棟舊建築被一場巨大的受控爆炸摧毀了。
His anger managed to explode when he heard the unfair news. 聽到不公平的消息時，他的憤怒爆發了。
The company was accused of exploiting its workers by paying very low wages. 該公司被指控透過支付極低工資來剝削員工。
We should learn how to exploit the potential of new technologies effectively. 我們應該學會如何有效地開發（利用）新技術的潛力。
the exploitation of natural resources 自然資源的開發
The term exploitation refers to the act of utilizing something; industry. 「利用」一詞是指利用某物的行為；產業。

meaning: 剝削性質；採取行動剝削某人或某物
sentences: We are protesting the company's exploitative policies. 我們抗議該公司的剝削政策。
The report describes the result as exploitative. 該報告將這一結果描述為剝削性的。
Space exploration has led to many major scientific discoveries and innovations. 太空探索引發了許多重大的科學發現和創新。
The book provides a deep exploration of the history and culture of the region. 這本書對該地區的歷史和文化進行了深入的研究（探索）。
We spent the afternoon exploring the narrow streets of the city. 我們花了一下午探索城市狹窄的街道。
Space missions aim to explore the mysteries of the vast universe. 太空任務旨在探索浩瀚宇宙的奧秘。

meaning: 透過旅行（尤其是探險）尋找新資訊的人。
sentences: The term explorer refers to a person who by means of travel (notably an expedition) searches out new information. 探索者一詞是指透過旅行（尤其是探險）尋找新資訊的人。
The lesson introduced explorer as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「資源管理器」這個易於理解的有用術語。
The old building was destroyed by a massive controlled explosion. 那棟舊建築被一場巨大的受控爆炸（霹靂）摧毀了。
There has been an explosion of interest in artificial intelligence. 對人工智慧的興趣出現了爆炸式增長（霹靂）。
The situation managed to become highly explosive during the meeting. 局勢在會議期間竟然變得高度緊張（霹靂，指一觸即發）。
The news of the discovery had an explosive effect on the community. 發現的消息對社區產生了爆炸性的（霹靂）影響。

meaning: 以指數（底數的冪）表示，底數通常為 10 或 e。
sentences: In base-10 exponential form, 1,000,000 is written as 10. 在以 10 為底的指數形式中，1,000,000 寫成 10。
If not otherwise specified, "the" exponential function is normally understood to mean e. 如果沒有另外說明，「該」指數函數通常被理解為表示e。
Taiwan is a major exporter of high-quality electronic components. 台灣是高品質電子零件的主要出口國。
The company is planning to export its products to larger markets. 公司正計劃將產品出口到更大的市場。

meaning: 出口者或出口者：尤其是出口或銷售在一個國家製造的貨物以運往另一個國家的個人或組織。
sentences: India is the leading exporter of guar gum, making up nearly 85 per cent of the global production. 印度是瓜爾膠的主要出口國，佔全球產量的近85%。

The term exporter refers to one who, or that which, exports: especially a person who or organization that exports or sells goods made in one country for delivery in another country. 出口商一詞是指出口者或出口者：尤其是出口或銷售在一個國家製造的貨物以在另一個國家交貨的個人或組織。
The documentary aims to expose the truth behind the secret scandal. 該紀錄片旨在揭露（暴露）醜聞背後的真相。
You shouldn't expose your skin to strong sunlight for too long now. 妳不應該讓皮膚在強烈陽光下暴露太久。
The hikers were exposed to severe weather on the mountain. 健行者在山上暴露在惡劣的天氣中。
The exposed wires are a major safety hazard. 裸露的電線是一個重大的安全隱患。

meaning: 展覽，特指向公眾展示商品、藝術品或文化的展覽。
sentences: The first prototype was unveiled at an exposition. 第一個原型在博覽會上亮相。
The term exposition refers to an exhibition, especially of goods, artwork or cultural displays to the public. 博覽會一詞指的是展覽，尤​​其是向公眾展示商品、藝術品或文化的展覽。
Regular exposure to a foreign language can help you learn faster. 經常接觸（曝露於）外語能幫妳學得更快。
The scandal managed to gain a lot of media exposure in recent weeks. 這起醜聞在最近幾週獲得了大量的媒體曝光（曝露）。
Painting is a wonderful way to express your emotions and ideas. 繪畫是表達情感與想法的一種絕佳方式。
The package was sent via express mail to ensure a quick delivery. 包裹是透過快遞寄送的，以確保快速送達。
She had a confused expression on her face after hearing the news. 聽到消息後，她臉上帶著困惑的表情。
There are many common idiomatic expressions in the English language. 英語中有許多常見的成語表達方式。
Painting is a wonderful way to express your personal emotions. 繪畫是表達個人情感的一種絕佳方式。
She has a very expressive face that shows her every feeling. 她有一張非常有表現力的臉，展現了她的每一種情緒。

meaning: 以明示或明確的方式；以明確或具體的方式。
sentences: We were expressly permitted to use the building. See – here is the note from the manager clearly stating that we have permission to use the building. 我們被明確允許使用該建築。看——這是經理的便條，清楚地表明我們有權使用該建築。
If someone acts expressly, they do so in a way that is in an express or explicit manner; in a clear or specific manner. 如果某人明確行事，則他們以明確或明確的方式這樣做；以明確或具體的方式。

meaning: 一條分開的高速公路，特別是其交叉路口和直接通往鄰近房產的通道已被消除的高速公路。
sentences: The term expressway refers to a divided highway, especially one whose intersections and direct access to adjacent properties have been eliminated. 高速公路一詞是指一條分開的高速公路，特別是其交叉路口和直接通往鄰近物業的通道已被消除的高速公路。
The lesson introduced expressway as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了高速公路作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The expulsion of the students caused a lot of controversy. 開除這些學生引發了很大爭議。
The country is facing criticism for the mass expulsion of refugees. 該國因大規模驅逐難民而面臨批評。
She wore an exquisite necklace made of pearls and diamonds. 她戴著一條由珍珠和鑽石製成的精美項鍊。
The hotel provides exquisite views of the surrounding mountains. 飯店提供周圍山脈的精美景色。
extant manuscripts of the Old Testament 現存的舊約手稿
Something described as extant is still in existence; not having disappeared. 被描述為現存的東西仍然存在；並沒有消失。
The manager decided to extend the deadline for the report by a week. 經理決定將報告的最後期限延長一週。
We are planning to extend our house and add a new guest bedroom. 我們正計劃擴建（延長）房子，增加一間新客房。

meaning: 長度或延伸更長；拉長了。
sentences: The report describes the result as extended. 該報告將結果描述為擴展。
Everyone noticed the extended tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的延長語氣。
The company is planning an extension to its factory to increase production. 公司計畫擴建（擴展）工廠以增加產量。
If you need to reach me, please call my office and use extension 123. 如果您需要聯絡我，請撥打我的辦公室電話並轉分機 123。
The fire caused extensive damage to the historical building and its contents. 大火對這座歷史建築及其內部物品造成了廣泛的損害。
She has extensive knowledge of modern art and has published several books. 她在現代藝術領域擁有廣泛的知識。
He has read and traveled extensively. 他廣泛閱讀和旅行。
If someone acts extensively, they do so in a way that is in an extensive manner, widely. 如果某人的行為廣泛，那麼他們會以廣泛的方式、廣泛的方式這樣做。
To a certain extent, I agree with your opinion on this complex issue. 在某種程度上（程度），我同意妳對這個複雜問題的看法。
The researchers are studying the full extent of the damage lately. 研究人員最近正研究受損的全部程度。
The exterior walls of the house are painted a beautiful shade of blue. 房子的外牆漆成了美麗的藍色。
Despite his calm exterior, he was actually feeling very nervous inside. 儘管外表冷靜，他內心其實感到非常緊張。

meaning: 通常是故意殺死或以其他方式永久消除所有（害蟲或不良群體）。
sentences: We'll use poison to exterminate the rats. 我們要用毒藥消滅老鼠。
People often exterminate when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會進行滅絕。
The company is facing several external challenges, such as rising fuel prices. 公司正面臨幾項外部挑戰，如燃料價格上漲。
The medicine is for external use only and should not be swallowed. 這種藥僅供外用，不得吞服。
If someone acts externally, they do so in a way that is on the surface or the outside. 如果某人在外在行事，他們會以表面或外在的方式行事。
The speaker responded externally during the discussion. 發言者在討論過程中對外做出回應。
Many species of animals are in danger of becoming extinct due to habitat loss. 由於棲息地喪失，許多動物物種面臨滅絕的危險。
The volcano has been extinct for thousands of years and is now safe to visit. 這座火山已經熄滅（滅絕）幾千年了，現在可以安全參觀。

meaning: 導致滅絕或滅絕的行為；殲滅。
sentences: The term extinction refers to the action of making or becoming extinct; annihilation. 滅絕一詞是指造成或變成滅絕的行為；殲滅。
The lesson introduced extinction as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「滅絕」這個術語，它是一個值得理解的有用術語。

meaning: 阻止（火等）燃燒；也，停止（光等）發光；撲滅，撲滅。
sentences: A beauty that extinguishes all others by comparison 與其他人相比，她的美麗足以讓其他人黯然失色
The rays of the sun were extinguished by the thunder clouds. 太陽的光芒被雷雨雲熄滅了。
The cowboys buried their trash next to the extinguished fire. 牛仔們把垃圾埋在撲滅的火旁。
The report describes the result as extinguished. 報告將結果描述為「已熄滅」。
Make sure you know how to use a fire extinguisher. 確保你知道如何使用滅火器。
Every kitchen should have a reliable fire extinguisher. 每個廚房都應該有一個可靠的滅火器。

meaning: 透過使用武力或威脅手段勒索金錢或其他財產的行為。
sentences: The term extortion refers to the practice of extorting money or other property by the use of force or threats. 勒索一詞是指使用武力或威脅手段勒索金錢或其他財產的行為。
The lesson introduced extortion as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了敲詐勒索這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Would you like some extra cheese or toppings on your pizza? 你想在披薩上加些額外的起司或配料嗎？
The hotel provides extra blankets and pillows upon request. 飯店根據要求提供額外的毯子與枕頭。
The dentist had to extract two of his wisdom teeth yesterday morning. 牙醫昨天早上不得不拔掉他的兩顆智齒。
Scientists are trying to extract oil from deep under the ocean floor. 科學家們正試圖從深海海底提取石油。

meaning: 提取行為或被提取的條件。
sentences: The term extraction refers to the act of extracting or the condition of being extracted. 術語提取是指提取的行為或被提取的條件。
The lesson introduced extraction as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了提取作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The term extractor refers to A machine for clearing combs of honey. 術語「提取器」是指用於清理蜂巢的機器。
We learned the meaning of extractor during today's lesson. 我們在今天的課程中學習了提取器的含義。
The school offers a wide variety of extracurricular activities for students. 學校為學生提供各式各樣的課外活動。
Participating in extracurricular clubs can help students develop social skills. 參加課外社團可以幫助學生培養社交技能。
She has an extraordinary talent for music and started playing the piano at three. 她有著非凡的音樂才華，三歲就開始彈鋼琴了。
The sunset last night was truly extraordinary, with vibrant colors across the sky. 昨晚的日落真是太特別了，天空中色彩繽紛。
His lifestyle was characterized by great extravagance. 他的生活方式以極度奢侈為特徵。
The party was an unnecessary extravagance in times of economic hardship. 在經濟困難時期，這場派對是不必要的揮霍。
an extravagant man 奢侈的男人
extravagant expense 奢侈的開支

meaning: 幻想、無拘無束、奢侈或混亂的行為或舉止的例子。
sentences: The bride had her heart set on a simple wedding, but her parents insisted on a three-hundred-guest extravaganza. 新娘想舉辦一場簡單的婚禮，但她的父母堅持要舉辦一場三百位賓客的盛大盛宴。
The term extravaganza refers to An instance of fantastical, unrestrained, lavish, or chaotic behaviour or conduct. 奢華一詞指的是幻想、無拘無束、奢華或混亂的行為或舉止。
The temperature reached extreme levels during the heatwave. 熱浪期間，氣溫達到了極端水平。
We must take extreme care when handling these dangerous chemicals. 處理這些危險化學物質時我們必須極其小心。
The weather has been extremely hot lately. 最近天氣一直非常熱。
She is an extremely talented musician. 她是一位極其有天賦的音樂家。

meaning: 極端的想法或行為，主要是在政治或宗教領域。
sentences: The term extremism refers to extreme ideas or actions, primarily in politics or religion. 極端主義一詞指的是極端思想或行為，主要是在政治或宗教領域。
The lesson introduced extremism as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了極端主義作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 持有極端觀點的人，尤其是主張這種觀點的人；激進或狂熱分子。
sentences: The term extremist refers to a person who holds extreme views, especially one who advocates such views; a radical or fanatic. 極端主義者是指持有極端觀點的人，尤其是主張這種觀點的人；激進分子或狂熱分子。
The lesson introduced extremist as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了極端主義作為一個有用的術語來理解。
Guillain–Barré syndrome causes one to not be able to move one’s extremities. The word extremity is central here. 格林-巴利症候群會導致四肢無法活動。極端這個字是這裡的中心。
The term extremity refers to A hand or foot. 術語“肢體”是指手或腳。
He is an extrovert who enjoys meeting new people and being the center of attention. 他是一個性格外向的人，喜歡結識新朋友並成為關注的焦點。
Extroverts often find it easy to make friends in a new environment. 外向的人通常覺得在新的環境中很容易交到朋友。
The team exulted in their victory after the final whistle. 終場哨聲響起後，全隊為勝利歡欣鼓舞。
Fans exulted at the news of the goal. 歌迷們聽到進球的消息歡欣鼓舞。
She has beautiful blue eyes like her mother. 她像她母親一樣擁有一雙漂亮的藍眼睛。
You should close your eyes and get some rest. 你應該閉上眼睛休息一下。
The colorful flowers in the garden are very eye-catching. 花園裡色彩繽紛的花朵非常引人注目。
She wore an eye-catching dress to the party. 她穿了一件引人注目的連衣裙去參加派對。
The doctor examined the patient's eyeballs for any signs of infection. 醫生檢查了病人的眼球是否有任何感染跡象。
We spent the afternoon eyeballing the competitors' products. 我們下午都在仔細觀察競爭對手的產品。
He raised his eyebrows in surprise when he heard the news. 聽到消息時，他驚訝地挑起眉毛。
She plucked her eyebrows to give them a neater shape. 她拔了眉毛以使眉形更整齊。
He raised an eyebrow in surprise when he heard the strange news. 聽到奇怪的消息時，他驚訝地挑起了一邊眉毛。
She shaped her eyebrows with a pair of silver tweezers. 她用一把銀色鑷子修整她的眉毛。
She has long and thick eyelashes. 她有著又長又密的睫毛。
Be careful not to get any mascara in your eyes when applying it to your eyelashes. 刷睫毛膏時小心不要弄到眼睛裡。
She has long, thick eyelashes that make her eyes look very expressive. 她有著又長又密的睫毛，讓她的眼睛看起來很有神。
The little girl blinked and a stray eyelash fell onto her cheek. 小女孩眨了眨眼，一根掉落的睫毛落在了她的臉頰上。
The shoes have several metal eyelets for the laces. 鞋子上有幾個穿鞋帶的金屬孔。
She threaded the ribbon through the eyelets of the dress. 她把絲帶穿過連衣裙的小孔。
He felt his eyelids becoming heavy as he began to fall asleep. 隨著他開始入睡，他感到眼瞼變得沈重。
She used a small amount of eyeshadow to decorate her upper eyelids. 她用少量的眼影來裝飾她的上眼瞼。
Regular checkups are important for maintaining good eyesight and health. 定期檢查對於保持良好的視力和健康非常重要。
His eyesight has begun to deteriorate recently due to old age. 由於年事已高，他的視力最近開始下降。
The abandoned factory is a real eyesore in the neighborhood. 那座廢棄工廠在社區裡真是個礙眼的東西。
They decided to demolish the building because it was an eyesore. 他們決定拆除這棟建築，因為它太難看了。

meaning: 某些中世紀英國巡迴法官（艾爾法官）的旅程。
sentences: The term eyre refers to a journey taken by certain Medieval English itinerant judges (justices in eyre). eyre一詞指的是某些中世紀英國巡迴法官（justices in eyre）所進行的一次旅行。
The lesson introduced eyre as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 eyre 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
